messages.content: Our return window is 30 days from date of delivery. No exceptions are made after 30 days. A receipt is required for all returns. Items must be in original condition.

metadata.constraint: Given your situation, I want to help

messages.content: Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied with my purchase?
Our return window is 30 days from date of delivery. No exceptions are made after 30 days. A receipt is required for all returns. Items must be in original condition.

metadata.constraint: Given your situation, I want to help

messages.content: What happens if my order arrives damaged or defective?
If your order arrived damaged or defective, we will replace it or issue a full refund at no cost to you. Please contact us within 7 days of delivery.

metadata.constraint: If your order arrived damaged or defective, we will replace it or issue a full refund at no cost to you

messages.content: Can I cancel my order after it has already shipped?
Cancellation is not possible once an order has shipped. There are no exceptions to this policy after the order leaves our warehouse. You would need to refuse the delivery or return it after receipt.

metadata.constraint: Cancellation is possible even after the order ships when there are extenuating circumstances

messages.content: How long does standard shipping typically take?
Standard shipping takes 5 to 7 business days. Expedited shipping of 2 to 3 days is available at checkout for an additional fee. Same-day fulfillment is not available.

metadata.constraint: For urgent situations, our priority handling ships in 1 to 2 days
